description: Phase 34: QuantMaps - Navigation & Location App. Create apps/quantmaps/ with maps, directions, real-time traffic, geofencing, place discovery, reviews, business listings, transportation integration, and AR navigation.
steps: Create apps/quantmaps/package.json with deps: @quant/common, @quant/auth, @quant/server-core, @quant/ai, fastify, zod, ioredis. Create apps/quantmaps/tsconfig.json.
Create apps/quantmaps/backend/app.ts following createApp pattern with routes for maps, places, directions, transportation
Create apps/quantmaps/backend/services/maps.service.ts - MapsService class: getTile, getStaticMap, geocode, reverseGeocode, getElevation, get3DBuildings, getStreetView
Create apps/quantmaps/backend/services/directions.service.ts - DirectionsService class: getRoute, getAlternativeRoutes, optimizeWaypoints, getETAs, getTrafficConditions, getNavigationInstructions

Create apps/quantmaps/backend/services/places.service.ts - PlacesService class: searchPlaces, getPlaceDetails, addReview, getReviews, getNearbyPlaces, getBusinessListings, claimBusiness, updateBusinessInfo
Create apps/quantmaps/backend/services/geofencing.service.ts - GeofencingService class: createGeofence, deleteGeofence, checkLocation, listGeofences, getGeofenceEvents, setGeofenceAlert
Create apps/quantmaps/backend/services/transportation.service.ts - TransportationService class: getRideEstimate, requestRide, trackDelivery, getPublicTransit, getTransitSchedule, bookRide, cancelRide
Create apps/quantmaps/backend/services/ar-navigation.service.ts - ARNavigationService class: getAROverlays, getIndoorMap, calculate3DPath, getARLandmarks, getPointsOfInterest
Create apps/quantmaps/backend/routes/maps.ts, routes/places.ts, routes/directions.ts, routes/transportation.ts - Fastify route handlers
Create apps/quantmaps/backend/__tests__/directions.service.test.ts - Tests for routing, ETA, traffic
Create apps/quantmaps/backend/__tests__/places.service.test.ts - Tests for place search, reviews, business listings
Create apps/quantmaps/backend/__tests__/geofencing.service.test.ts - Tests for geofence CRUD and location checks
acceptance_criteria: apps/quantmaps/ directory exists with proper package.json and tsconfig.json
MapsService provides geocoding, tile rendering, and street view
DirectionsService computes routes with alternatives and real-time traffic
PlacesService enables discovery, reviews, and business management
GeofencingService handles spatial boundaries with event alerts
TransportationService integrates ride-hailing and public transit
All services use zod for input validation
Unit tests pass for directions, places, and geofencing
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem && npx vitest run apps/quantmaps/backend/__tests__/ --passWithNoTests
